name: Large File Archive Prepare
summary: Prepare large HPC datasets for archival, publication, or handoff.
description: This skill helps users create a conservative archive plan with a file manifest, size summary, and optional tar.gz creation step for user-owned datasets.

inputs.name: source_path
inputs.description: User-owned file or directory to prepare for archival.

inputs.name: archive_stem
inputs.description: Short archive name used for generated record files.

inputs.name: create_archive
inputs.description: Opt-in flag that creates the tar.gz archive after reviewing the plan.

outputs.name: file_manifest
outputs.description: Sorted file list for the archive contents.

outputs.name: archive_summary
outputs.description: Record of source path, file count, size estimate, and intended archive path.

outputs.name: archive_plan
outputs.description: Reviewable tar command and checklist before archival or publication.

outputs.name: archive_file
outputs.description: Optional tar.gz archive created only when CREATE_ARCHIVE=1.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run against a small user-owned directory, inspect the plan, then rerun with CREATE_ARCHIVE=1 and validate the archive manifest.
